movesList.name: Blitz Shield
inputs: Any other attack button (Rejects incoming attacks, costs 25% Tension)

movesList.name: Yellow Roman Cancel (YRC)
inputs: Any 3 attack buttons while opponent is not in blockstun/hitstun (Costs 25% Tension)

movesList.name: Danger Time
inputs: causing all hits to be Mortal Counters

movesList.name: Burst Overdrive
inputs: D (Consumes Burst gauge to increase Overdrive damage)
